creator: bahamasfranks@gmail.com
text:
Well, I just did a

make rmconfig
make distclean
make

without problems.  Seemed to find and build and link with libftdi 0.17...

Steve

On Sun, May 16, 2010 at 1:18 AM, Stefan Walter <stefan@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Hi Tomek, hi Steve!
>
> Steve: Tomek sent a problem report for the port devel/urjtag, which you
> maintain, a while ago. Could you have a look at it and maybe send a
> followup to the PR? (See [1].)
>
> Tomek: The port devel/urjtag has been modified in the meantime. Could you
> please send a followup to the PR and let us know if you're still seeing
> the problem with the most recent version?
>
> Best regards,
> Stefan
>
> [1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/143925
>
